summary: Comprehensive testing of NotebookLM-like workspace app completed successfully. All backend APIs functioning correctly with 100% success rate. Frontend UI working properly with successful file upload, source management, and AI integration. Real GPT-5.1 AI generation confirmed working for chat and content generation.
passed_tests: File upload endpoint POST /api/sources/upload - successfully processes TXT files
URL source add endpoint POST /api/sources/url - successfully extracts content
Get sources endpoint GET /api/sources - returns proper source list
AI chat endpoint POST /api/chat - GPT-5.1 integration working with citations
AI generation endpoint POST /api/generate - generates slides with 9 slide structure
Frontend loads correctly with all navigation tabs functional
Add Source button opens upload modal with file/URL/web search tabs
Studio tab shows all 7 generation tools (Audio, Slides, Video, Mind Map, Report, Flashcards, Quiz)
File upload workflow works end-to-end - file processed and indexed
Sources view displays uploaded sources with proper metadata
Chat interface accepts input and generates AI responses
Real-time source statistics and analytics display correctly
